prestazioni: Engine: LS3 6.2L V8 (GM LS3 crate engine, code LS376/525) – forged internals upgrade with Manley 4340 steel crankshaft (4.000" stroke), Manley I-beam connecting rods (6.125" length), and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (10.7:1 compression) for 800+ HP reliability on E85.

Forced Induction: Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (88mm compressor wheel, .96 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 4" V-band downpipe and Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate, paired with a PTP 4" aluminum intercooler core (1200 CFM) and Vibrant Performance 4" silicone couplers.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB LSD (QDF7Z) in a Tilton 7.25" twin-disc clutch setup (ceramic-metallic friction material) with a custom 4.10:1 final drive ratio in the Ultima-specific transaxle housing, reinforced with a Cusco 1.5-way limited-slip differential and billet aluminum differential mounts.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Rocket Bunny Ultima RS-specific widebody kit (Pandem V3.5) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and GT-style rear wing (adjustable 3-position angle), all finished in 3M Gloss Black with red pinstriping.

Suspension: Öhlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers (24-click rebound, 22-click compression, 12-click high-speed compression) with custom valving for Ultima’s 50/50 weight distribution, paired with SuperPro polyurethane bushings (90A durometer) and spherical bearing control arms.

Wheels & Brakes: Work Meister S1 3P wheels (18x10.5 +25 front, 18x12 +35 rear) in Hyper Silver with Toyo R888R tires (275/35/18 front, 335/30/18 rear), stopping power via AP Racing CP9430-8S 6-piston front calipers (380mm two-piece rotors) and CP9431-4S 4-piston rear calipers (355mm rotors).
